creator: bokutin@bokut.in
text:
* portlint looks fine.
* poudriere testport ok (13.4, amd64)
* works fine
* update 3.0.2 -> 3.2.5

3.0.2 does not work with postgresql 17, so I updated it.

The changelog is here. https://pgroonga.github.io/news/
Significant
3.2.5: 2024-12-05
* Dropped support for PostgreSQL 12.
3.2.4: 2024-10-03
* Added support for PostgreSQL 17.
3.1.4: 2023-09-29
* Added support for PostgreSQL 16.
3.1.0: 2023-07-12
* Required Groonga 13.0.2 or later.

It didn't work with textproc/groonga 13.0.5.
So I updated textproc/groonga from 13.0.5 to 14.1.2.
https://github.com/pgroonga/pgroonga/commit/107e0b0e9f09f2cb9de4d78e1417c02bdc014aa9#diff-c6ba3852442c52e724572f96cbb2c3a53c28c88aa4dcd11b61b883dbdc4da04cR1
Although not mentioned in the changelog, it is assumed that 14.0.0 or higher is now required.
